overall.description: First-person perspective of a person walking along a narrow dirt trail through natural vegetation at night, illuminated by a handheld flashlight or headlamp. The surroundings are dark with only the path and immediate bushes visible in the beam of light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt trail through brush at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight while navigating the uneven ground

entered.detail: narrow unpaved path with loose gravel and dirt, illuminated by the flashlight beam
dense shrubs and tall grass lining the right side of the trail
tall grass and low vegetation on the left side of the path
dark silhouette of trees against the night sky forming the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail at night, with a flashlight illuminating the path ahead. Dense vegetation lines both sides of the trail, appearing as dark shapes outside the beam of light, while the tree line is visible against the dark sky in the distance. No other people or vehicles are present in this isolated natural setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded dirt trail through a dark, natural landscape. It begins with a steady advance into the night, where a handheld flashlight carves a narrow path of visibility through the surrounding gloom. As the camera progresses, the beam reveals dense vegetation lining both sides of the trail, casting the immediate foliage into sharp relief against the deep shadows. The scene then opens slightly to reveal the distant silhouette of a tree line etched against the dark sky, maintaining a sense of isolation as the light flickers across the uneven ground.
